question: Which sub-districts reported cases of pregnant women with hemoglobin levels below 11 in rural areas but had no such cases in urban areas during the year 2021?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ds.DISTRICT_NAME, sd.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, mht.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11
FROM FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mht
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON mht.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT ds ON sd.DISTRICT_ID = ds.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_MONTH m ON mht.MONTH_ID = m.MONTH_ID
JOIN DIM_YEAR y ON m.YEAR_ID = y.YEAR_ID
WHERE y.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
  AND sd.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural'
  AND mht.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd_urban
    JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mht_urban ON mht_urban.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = sd_urban.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
    JOIN DIM_MONTH m_urban ON mht_urban.MONTH_ID = m_urban.MONTH_ID
    JOIN DIM_YEAR y_urban ON m_urban.YEAR_ID = y_urban.YEAR_ID
    WHERE sd_urban.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
      AND sd_urban.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban'
      AND y_urban.YEAR_VALUE = 2021
      AND mht_urban.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 > 0
